data.name: Hot Tub Simulator
data.detailed_description:
Become the most popular hot tub streamer starting from scratch. Gain subscribers and make your channel grow.

  • Customize your avatar to be like your favourite streamer or the streamer you always wanted to be!

  • Unlock cute bikinis and change them on stream to gain your viewer's attention!

  • Gain money through subscriptions and unlock new places to stream!

  • Unlock skills to satisfy your audience and make the stream more interesting!

  • Write your subsriber's names on the whiteboard!

  • Ignore your viewers while you are on your phone and still make money!
data.about_the_game:
Become the most popular hot tub streamer starting from scratch. Gain subscribers and make your channel grow.

  • Customize your avatar to be like your favourite streamer or the streamer you always wanted to be!

  • Unlock cute bikinis and change them on stream to gain your viewer's attention!

  • Gain money through subscriptions and unlock new places to stream!

  • Unlock skills to satisfy your audience and make the stream more interesting!

  • Write your subsriber's names on the whiteboard!

  • Ignore your viewers while you are on your phone and still make money!
data.short_description: Become the most successful hot tub streamer in the world! Experience the life of a streamer, start small and grow your channel thanks to your viewers! Dance, unlock cute bikinis, interact with your viewers and much more...
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-3570K or similar
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 780 or similar
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-4790 or similar
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1060 or similar
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-3570K or similar
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 780 or similar
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i7-4790 or similar
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GTX 1060 or similar
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
